CTN 4, 200 [Enuma Eliš 2][via cams/gkab]

flake
flakeflake NaN  (start of surface missing)
flake 1'flake 1'

[... ur-ru-ḫi]-⸢iš ta-kab⸣-[ba-as x x]

(Marduk saying to Anšar:) 'You will very soon tread on [...].'

flake 2'2'

[... mu-du]-⸢u₂⸣ gi-⸢mir⸣ [x x]

(Anšar replying:) '[...], knowing all [...],

flake 3'3'

[x x šu-up-ši]-ḫa ina te!-e-⸢ka⸣ [x x]

'calm [...] with your [...] incantation!

flake 4'4'

[... ur-ru]-ḫi-iš šu-tar-⸢di⸣-[ma]

'Keep having [...] driven very quickly,

flake 5'5'

[... ut-tak]-⸢ka⸣-ša!(RU) te-e-er ar-ka-nu-⸢uš⸣

'so that [...] it may [...] be repulsed, bring (it safely) back.'

flake 6'6'

[... be]-⸢lu₄⸣ a-na a-mat a-bi-šu

The lord [...] at his father's words,

flake 7'7'

[... lib₃-ba]-⸢šu!⸣-ma a-na a-bi-šu₂ i-zak-kar

his heart [...], as he said to his father:

flake 8'8'

[x x DINGIR]-⸢MEŠ⸣ ši-mat DINGIR.DINGIR GAL.GAL

'[...] of the gods, O destiny of the great gods,

flake 9'9'

[... a-na]-⸢ku⸣ mu-ter gi-mil-⸢li⸣-[ku-un]

'[...] I (am to be) your avenger,

flake 10'10'

[...] ⸢u₂⸣-bal-laṭ ⸢ka⸣-[a-šu₂-un]

'[...] I am to save your lives,

flake 11'11'

[... šu-te]-⸢ra i⸣-[ba-a x x]

'[...] make supreme (and) name [...]!'

(rest of surface missing)
